component.name: Status pill
component.description: Rounded pill for job lifecycle and similar states. Typography/LABEL; padding Spacing/12 × Spacing/4; stroke 1px. Fills and strokes are bound to semantic status color variables in Figma (see `tokens.colors`). Embedded in **Job Card** (`622:161`) header in the FieldSolo file.

variants.paid: Success: BG + Text + stroke **Semantic/Status/Success/** (mint / teal). Figma variant label appears as `Paid` in the set.
variants.notStarted: Neutral: **10%** tint fill + **Semantic/Status/Neutral/Text** stroke and label (flattened BG in `colors.json`). Figma variant label is `Not started`.
variants.inProgress: Info: **10%** blue tint **Semantic/Status/Info/BG** + **Semantic/Status/Info/Text** stroke and label. Figma variant label is `In Progress`.
variants.completed: Warning: **Semantic/Status/Warning/BG**, stroke **Semantic/Status/Warning/Stroke** at **50%** paint opacity, label **Semantic/Status/Warning/Label** (amber `#92400E`). Figma variant label is `COMPLETED`.
variants.onHold: Paused: **10%** purple tint **Semantic/Status/Paused/BG** + **Semantic/Status/Paused/Text** stroke and label. Figma variant label is `ON HOLD`.

notes: 2026-04-10: Added explicit `status-pill` / `status-pill-label` data-name hooks in TSX to mirror the component set structure.
2026-04-10: Figma variant labels in `622:143` are mixed-case and uppercase; code preserves semantic `kind` names and maps labels in `StatusPill.tsx`.
findings: 2026-04-08: Component set `622:143` — `VERTICAL` + `NO_WRAP`, 16px `itemSpacing`; `clipsContent` false on set and variant masters. Each variant is a horizontal auto-layout pill with `status-pill-label` TEXT; matches `StatusPill.tsx` `data-name`. No `flatten()` in automation. If Figma reports component-set errors, likely duplicate variant master names (`status-pill` ×6)—fix by disambiguating variant properties in Figma if instances break; not changed in automation.
